description.value: Rajkamal Overseas (Factory) is a distinguished handicraft exporter based in Moradabad, renowned for its exquisite range of decorative items. Specializing in finely crafted copper items, lanterns, candle holders, and decorative lamps, they bring traditional artistry to global markets.

address.value: Prabhat Market, Ram Ganga Bridge, Katghar

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Two lanterns of different sizes, intricate wirework, small feet at base, hanging loop at top.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays two decorative lanterns of differing sizes, crafted from dark metal wire. Both lanterns feature a geometric, multi-faceted design that tapers upwards, resembling an inverted truncated pyramid or cone with intricate triangular and polygonal patterns. They are presented against a plain, light-colored background, suggesting a studio product shot.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Two dark metal wire lanterns, one larger and one smaller, with intricate geometric designs, on a plain light background.

visual_features.size_impression: a set of three varying in height (small, medium, large relative to each other)
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: set of three, ribbed/fluted design on stems

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a set of three metallic candle holders of varying heights, presented against a plain white background. Each candle holder features a round base, a slender, tapered stem with a ribbed or fluted design, and a cup-shaped top designed to hold a candle. The metal appears to be silver-toned with a brushed or matte finish, suggesting a quality, durable construction.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Set of three silver-toned metallic candle holders of varying heights, featuring ribbed stems and round bases, on a white background.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a decorative pendant lamp fixture featuring a copper-toned metal wire cage shade and a matching dome-shaped ceiling rose/canopy. A black electrical cord connects the components, appearing coiled next to the canopy. The product is presented on a rustic surface composed of rough wooden planks and earthy ground, suggesting an outdoor or natural setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Copper-toned wire cage pendant lamp fixture with black cord and matching canopy, displayed on a rustic wooden surface.

visual_features.color_appearance: white exterior, natural light brown wood interior
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: two-tone design, natural wood grain visible inside

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, two-tone wooden bowl presented against a plain white background. The bowl features a smooth, matte white exterior that tapers inwards towards the base, while its interior reveals the natural light brown wood grain. The rim of the bowl is also natural wood, showing a slight irregularity in its circular shape, indicating a handcrafted or organic aesthetic. The overall quality appears good, with clean lines and a simple, modern presentation.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A two-tone wooden bowl with a matte white exterior and a natural light brown wood interior, presented on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: glass panels, hinged lid, empty interior

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a rectangular jewelry box made of clear glass panels with a dark-toned metal frame, presented on a plain white background. The box features a hinged lid that is open, revealing the empty interior. The overall appearance suggests a simple, modern design suitable for displaying jewelry or small items.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Rectangular clear glass jewelry box with a dark metal frame and an open hinged lid, on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Complex assembly with hydraulic unit, hoses, and electrical controls.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a large, complex piece of industrial machinery, likely a brick-making machine, composed of a main frame and a separate hydraulic power unit. The machine is predominantly blue and grey, with various metal components, hoses, and electrical boxes visible. It is presented against a plain white background, suggesting a studio product shot.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Blue and grey industrial brick-making machine with a separate hydraulic power unit, presented on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: ribbed texture visible on the bars

media_assets.visual_description: The image shows a close-up, angled view of numerous dark grey, cylindrical steel reinforcement bars (TMT bars) stacked together. Each bar features a distinct ribbed texture along its length, indicating its purpose for enhanced grip in construction. The background is out of focus, suggesting a large quantity of these bars in an industrial setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Close-up of a stack of dark grey, ribbed steel reinforcement bars (TMT bars) in an industrial setting.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Visible wood grain, multiple sheets stacked

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a stack of multiple rectangular plywood sheets, fanned out slightly to show their individual surfaces and edges. The plywood has a light reddish-brown, natural wood color with visible wood grain patterns. The background is indistinct, suggesting a simple studio or warehouse setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Close-up of a stack of light reddish-brown rectangular plywood sheets, fanned out to show their wood grain.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Detailed model or toy excavator, predominantly yellow with black and grey components.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a detailed model excavator, predominantly yellow with black and grey accents, positioned against a clean white background. The excavator features a tracked base, a cabin with dark windows, a long articulated boom, and a large black digging bucket. The product appears to be a high-quality replica or toy, presented in a standard studio product shot style.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A detailed yellow and black model excavator with a digging bucket, presented on a clean white background.

visual_features.color_appearance: white bucket, blue lid, blue, green, black, and brown label elements with white text
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Text 'Flat', 'High quality emulsion', 'Acrylic emulsion' visible on the label. A stylized logo is also visible on the blue section of the label.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a white cylindrical bucket with a blue lid, likely containing paint. The bucket features a label with a blue geometric design on the left, a green and black section below it, and a brown section on the right with white text that reads "Flat," "High quality emulsion," and "Acrylic emulsion." The product is presented against a plain white background, indicating a studio shot.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A white cylindrical paint bucket with a blue lid, featuring a label with blue, green, and brown sections and text 'Flat' and 'High quality emulsion'.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Paneled design, three rectangular glass inserts, vertical handle

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a light-colored wooden door with an arched top and a rectangular body, presented against a plain white background. The door features a paneled design with multiple rectangular sections, including three clear glass inserts at the top. A dark, vertical handle is visible on the right side of the door.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Arched top wooden door with light natural wood grain, paneled design, three glass inserts, and a dark vertical handle.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays four light gray cylindrical pipes of varying diameters, arranged diagonally against a plain white background. The pipes appear to be made of a smooth, matte material, with their hollow ends visible, indicating their tubular nature. The presentation is clean and focused solely on the product.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Four light gray cylindrical pipes of different diameters are arranged diagonally against a plain white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: three circular holes on top surface

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, rectangular building brick with a reddish-brown hue and a slightly textured surface. Three evenly spaced, circular holes are visible along the top face of the brick. It is presented in a clean, studio-style shot against a plain white background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Reddish-brown building brick with three circular holes on its top surface, presented against a white background.

plan_execution.reasoning: Company profile is mostly complete with a good initial confidence. There are 100 raw products, but will process up to 20. A reviews API URL is present, so run reviews agent. Phones list is empty, so Sign3 will be called after social enrichment if new phones are found.
